context: Tests whether the agent runs all five Phase 8 final accuracy checks: code syntax validity, command flag correctness, file reference existence, 'Use when...' clause in description, and absence of concepts the agent already knows. The SKILL.md has a Python syntax error, a missing Use-when clause, and explanatory text about known concepts (HTTP/TCP).

checklist.name: Code syntax check included
checklist.description: Report includes a dedicated check for code syntax validity (covering Python, JavaScript, or bash code blocks)

checklist.name: Python syntax error found
checklist.description: Report correctly identifies the Python syntax error (missing closing parenthesis in `json.loads(result.stdout`)

checklist.name: Command flags check included
checklist.description: Report includes a dedicated check for command flag correctness (validating logq or other command flags)

checklist.name: File references check included
checklist.description: Report includes a dedicated check for whether all linked files exist

checklist.name: File reference passes
checklist.description: Report correctly identifies that QUERY_PATTERNS.md reference passes (file exists in the bundle)

checklist.name: Use when clause check included
checklist.description: Report includes a dedicated check for whether the description contains a 'Use when...' trigger clause

checklist.name: Use when clause fails
checklist.description: Report correctly identifies that the description is MISSING a 'Use when...' clause (current description doesn't start with or include 'Use when')

checklist.name: Known concepts check included
checklist.description: Report includes a dedicated check for whether the skill explains concepts that an agent already knows

checklist.name: Known concepts issue found
checklist.description: Report flags the HTTP/TCP explanation ('HTTP is a stateless request/response protocol...') as content an agent already knows

checklist.name: Readiness summary
checklist.description: Report ends with a clear summary of whether the skill is ready to publish or lists required fixes first
